briefdescription.para: Symbol indicating whether the main voltage regulator (VREGMAIN) is present.
Symbol indicating whether high voltage regulator (VREGH) is present.
Symbol indicating whether medium voltage regulator (VREGM) is present.
Symbol indicating whether radio regulator (VREGRADIO) is present.
Symbol indicating whether SYSTEMOFF functionality is present.
Symbol indicating whether any regulator is present.
Symbol indicating whether Power-On-Fail Comparator (POF Comparator) is present.
Symbol indicating whether POF Comparator for VDDH is present.
Symbol indicating whether POF Comparator can disable POFWARN event.
Symbol indicating whether POF Comparator status is present.
Symbol indicating whether TRIM register is present.
Symbol indicating whether main supply status is present.
Symbol indicating whether inductor detection is present.
Symbol indicating whether HIBERNATOR register is present.
Components allowed to introduce ELV mode.
Normal voltage mode. Voltage supplied on VDD and VDDH.
High voltage mode. Voltage supplied on VDDH.
Function for enabling or disabling the specified voltage regulator.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Regulator to be enabled or disabled.
True if specified voltage regulator is to be enabled, false otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Function for checking whether the specified voltage regulator is enabled.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Regulator to be checked.
Specified voltage regulator is enabled.
Specified voltage regulator is disabled.

briefdescription.para: Function for putting the CPU in System OFF mode.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting the main supply status.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting the POF Comparator configuration.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Pointer to the structure containing POF Comparator configuration.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting the POF Comparator configuration.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Pointer to the structure to be filled with POF Comparator configuration.

briefdescription.para: Function for checking if the detected voltage is below or above the threshold of VPOF (POF Comparator's threshold voltage).

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Voltage below VPOF threshold has been detected.
Voltage above VPOF threshold has been detected.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting components that are allowed to introduce the ELV mode.

simplesect.para: This register is retained when retention is enabled.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Mask of components to be set, created using nrf_regulators_elv_mode_allow_mask_t.

briefdescription.para: Function for geting components that are allowed to introduce the ELV mode.

simplesect.para: This register is retained when retention is enabled.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.

simplesect.para: Mask of components allowed to introduce ELV mode, created using nrf_regulators_elv_mode_allow_mask_t.

briefdescription.para: Function for checking whether an inductor is connected to the DCC pin.

simplesect.para: The detection can only take place if the VREG_MAIN DC/DC converter is not enabled.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Inductor detected.
Inductor not detected.

briefdescription.para: Function for putting the CPU in hibernation mode.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.

briefdescription.para: Function for enabling or disabling the GPIO retention release on wake up from hibernation mode.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
True if GPIO retention release is to be enabled, false otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Function for checking the GPIO retention status.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
GPIO retention is active.
GPIO retention is not active.
